title: Getting Started
content: Welcome to our platform. To get started, create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage. You will need to provide your name, email address, and a strong password. After signing up, verify your email by clicking the link we send to your inbox. Once verified, you can log in and explore all features. New users are given a free 14-day trial with access to all premium features.

title: Reset Password
content: You can reset your password from the Settings page. Navigate to Settings, then click on the Security tab. Click on Change Password and enter your current password followed by your new password. Confirm the new password and click Save. If you forgot your password, go to the login page and click Forgot Password. Enter your registered email address and we will send you a password reset link. The link is valid for 30 minutes.

title: Billing and Subscription
content: We offer three subscription plans: Free, Pro, and Enterprise. The Free plan includes up to 5 projects and 1GB storage. The Pro plan costs $19 per month and includes unlimited projects, 50GB storage, and priority support. The Enterprise plan is custom-priced and includes dedicated infrastructure, SSO, and a dedicated account manager. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from the Billing section in Settings. Payments are processed securely via Stripe. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and American Express.

title: Account Deletion
content: To permanently delete your account, go to Settings and click on the Account tab. Scroll to the bottom and click Delete Account. You will be asked to type DELETE to confirm. Note that account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, projects, and files will be deleted within 30 days of the request. If you have an active subscription, it will be cancelled immediately. You will not receive a refund for unused time.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security to your account. To enable 2FA, go to Settings and open the Security tab. Click Enable Two-Factor Authentication. You can use any authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy. Scan the QR code displayed on screen with your authenticator app. Enter the 6-digit code generated by the app to confirm setup. Once enabled, you will be asked for a code every time you log in. You can also generate backup codes in case you lose access to your authenticator app.

title: File Upload and Storage
content: You can upload files by dragging and dropping them into the dashboard or clicking the Upload button. Supported file formats include PDF, PNG, JPG, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, and ZIP. The maximum file size is 100MB per file. Free plan users get 1GB of storage. Pro users get 50GB and Enterprise users get unlimited storage. Files are stored securely with AES-256 encryption. You can organize files into folders and share them with team members by clicking Share on any file.

title: Team Collaboration
content: You can invite team members to collaborate on projects. Go to your project, click on the Members tab, and enter the email address of the person you want to invite. They will receive an email invitation. You can assign roles: Viewer, Editor, or Admin. Viewers can only view content. Editors can create and edit content but cannot manage members. Admins have full control including member management and project deletion. Team workspaces are available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

title: API Access and Developer Tools
content: Developers can access our platform programmatically using the REST API. To generate an API key, go to Settings and click on the Developer tab. Click Generate API Key and copy the key immediately as it will only be shown once. API requests must include the key in the Authorization header as Bearer your_api_key. The API supports JSON format. Rate limits apply: Free users get 100 requests per day, Pro users get 10,000 requests per day, and Enterprise users get unlimited requests. Full API documentation is available at docs.example.com/api.

title: Data Export
content: You can export all your data at any time. Go to Settings and click the Privacy tab. Click Request Data Export. We will prepare a ZIP file containing all your projects, files, and account data. You will receive an email when the export is ready, usually within 24 hours. The download link is valid for 7 days. Data is exported in standard formats: JSON for structured data and original format for files. This feature is available to all users including Free plan users.

title: Customer Support
content: We offer multiple support channels. Free plan users can access our Help Center at help.example.com which includes documentation and video tutorials. Pro users can submit support tickets and expect a response within 24 hours on business days. Enterprise users get 24/7 phone and email support with a dedicated account manager. You can also join our community forum at community.example.com to connect with other users and get help from the community. For urgent issues, Enterprise users can call our support hotline listed in their welcome email.
